name: Null Island
description: The mythical island at 0°N 0°E — the point in the ocean where a latitude of 0 meets a longitude of 0. In GIS, it's become famous as the place where data with missing or zero coordinates magically 'lands'. A beloved in-joke of the geo world.

stories.author: Anonymous
stories.text: If you work in GIS long enough, you'll eventually send thousands of points to Null Island by accident.
